description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Laravel Docker image registry.gitlab.com/newroseji/laravel:latest with a mysql:5.7 service and sets DB_HOST, DB_USERNAME, MYSQL_DATABASE, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a unit_test job that runs cp .env.example .env, composer install, php artisan key:generate, php artisan migrate, and vendor/bin/phpunit. In the deploy stage add a deploy_production job that runs only on the master branch, is manual, sets up ssh-agent (installing openssh-client if missing), starts the agent, adds the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates ~/.ssh, disables strict host key checking when inside Docker, and executes ~/.composer/vendor/bin/envoy run deploy to the production environment at http://192.168.56.101.
